testcase.name: test_solomonpay_dashboard_has_data
testcase.failure: tests/test_solomon_demo_qa.py:174: in test_solomonpay_dashboard_has_data assert response.status_code == 200, f"SolomonPay dashboard failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: SolomonPay dashboard failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_solomonpay_trend_has_data
testcase.failure: tests/test_solomon_demo_qa.py:198: in test_solomonpay_trend_has_data assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_audit_log_has_entries
testcase.failure: tests/test_solomon_demo_qa.py:441: in test_audit_log_has_entries assert response.status_code == 200, f"Audit log failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Audit log failed: {"detail":"Not authenticated"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
